visual_description: An older man with curly hair, wearing a dark shirt, is seated and has a hand placed on his shoulder. A young child with short hair, wearing a light-colored shirt, is partially visible behind him, looking downward. The setting appears dimly lit with a wall and hanging items in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a child's voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, accompanied by a gasp and a sigh.
